positive: A stylized, central illustration of a majestic crescent moon cradling abstract constellations and celestial flora. The style is neo-tribal geometric linework mixed with Art Nouveau organic flow. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and bold black outlines against a deep cosmic navy background. Incorporate glowing, minimal pop-art pops of turquoise and gold leaf accents. Highly detailed vector illustration, suitable for screen printing on dark garments. Minimalist, high contrast, graphic novel style, centered composition.
negative: blur, noise, smudge, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, blurry background, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines
